column1: # /Range Search Formulas → Find walks through every match.
# After /RSF ... Find, the session stays live: Enter advances to the
# next match, wrapping back to the first when we run off the end.
# Search string "B1" — matches in A1 and A5.
# /F → Find. Pointer moves to first match (A1).
# Enter advances to the second match (A5).
